violations.text: The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025
The door to the employee's toilet room is not self-closing. The door to the employee's toilet room shall be provided with self-closing door. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

The walls in the bar area are constructed of sheet rock. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025
